problem id: 0031df9c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6)

examples:
  00000000 -> 00000000
  11001011 -> 11110010
  11110010 -> 10111100
  01001000 -> 00010010
  01101000 -> 00011010
  01011101 -> 01010111
  10111001 -> 01101110
  11011111 -> 11110111
  11110101 -> 01111101
  01111001 -> 01011110

query: 11010000
predicted answer: 00110100
